title: Will the EVA Store ship to America
display_title: Will the EVA Store ship to America
wikitext:
[]: Will the EVA Store ship to America?             Quote Post by Kamina » Sun Dec 06, 2009 3:31 pm Their are a few things like clothes and specifically a pair of Nerve headphones Ive had my eyes on that i have failed to find anywhere else online that i know for a fact ships to America where i shop regularly, will EVA store ship here?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 06, 2009 3:33 pm Only if you find a proxy and/or somebody who can buy things from Japan and ship it to you over here. Otherwise, unless they start to have international shipping, there's no way.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 06, 2009 3:36 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Only if you find a proxy and/or somebody who can buy things from Japan and ship it to you over here. Otherwise, unless they start to have international shipping, there's no way.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 06, 2009 3:53 pm , of course!

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sun Dec 06, 2009 3:59 pm Danny Choo endorses http://japantodoor.com/

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sun Dec 06, 2009 11:08 pm I think there was another one called CELGA? You can also look on sites such has HLJ.com JPQueen.com they carry some of the same stuff The Evastore would make a bit of money from the US, so they should open up International Shipping

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Mon Dec 07, 2009 2:04 pm Ill look into these services, i would totally but the 300 dollar unit one headphones but im too poor to afford that right now, so much better then a pair of skull candy headphones. So im settling for the 30 dollar Nerve headphones, and a couple tshirts and a pair of shoes probably, the Radio Eva unit 1 and 2 shoes are awesomely gaudy. If you cant tell most the stuff i wear is quite bold lol. Ill be so tempted not to wear the shoes tho, to cool to get dirty lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Boredom » Mon Dec 07, 2009 3:25 pm Another choice might be http://akadotretail.com im sure if you send them an email they can get you whatever not sure tho, plus they might charge you abit more...

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Wed Dec 16, 2009 7:55 pm Ive used them before actually, i have had no problems other then a watch i bought off of them and their customer service sucked, i could hardly understand one guy i got and when i did get it straighten out they wanted me to pay to ship it both ways and i lol and just fixed the dam thing rather then getting it replaced.

[]:             Quote Post by chibibunny713 » Tue Feb 02, 2010 9:03 am DOES the eva store accept my visa from america??? The shipping address is in Japan, and I was about to place my order when I saw: "Corporate credit cards, cards issued abroad, some co-branded card, and a companion card, the installment is not accepted, please check in advance." - http://www.evastore.jp/guide/index.html#topic02

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Tue Feb 02, 2010 11:35 am I haven't ordered from this particular store, but my Visa from America works fine in other Japanese locations.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Tue Feb 02, 2010 4:18 pm I wish.:(
